treatment_journey.name: Prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Started aggressive treatment immediately. Prednisone and azathioprine combo... Prednisone sent blood sugars through roof. Needed insulin. Still on it.

treatment_journey.name: Azathioprine
treatment_journey.evidence: Azathioprine helped for about two years. Then liver enzymes started climbing. Had to stop.

treatment_journey.name: Remicade
treatment_journey.evidence: Switched to Remicade... Then developed antibodies. Stopped working completely within weeks.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: Tried Humira next. Currently on it but not as effective.
